name: planning-doc-staleness
question: Are there planning docs in docs/planning/{intakes,plans}/ whose corresponding work has shipped (commit-hash-found OR all-spec-entries-DONE) but the file remains un-archived?

stale.path: string (planning doc path relative to repo root)

fresh.path: string (planning doc path relative to repo root)

unknown.path: string (planning doc path relative to repo root)
unknown.reason: string (one-line diagnostic explaining why neither signal fired)

schema.briefing: string (briefing line for session-start hook; empty when stale[] and unknown[] both empty)

fallback: Manually list docs/planning/{intakes,plans}/, run git log --since=60.days.ago --grep=<slug> per file, parse each doc body for spec-entry refs and grep SPECIFICATION.md for [DONE]/[DELIVERED] markers. Slow and error-prone vs. the oracle.

provenance.note: SWEEP-02 Verification Oracle. Detection leg of the DEC-53 hybrid model; the action leg is /0-uldf-finalize Phase 8.7 (SWEEP-03). Trigger: DISC-HYGIENE-03.

config.comment: Edit scan_* paths to retarget; commit_window_days governs Heuristic 1's git-log lookback; fresh_mtime_window_days governs the fresh-vs-unknown threshold for files with no signal. The runtime authoritative values live in run.{sh,ps1}; this block documents the contract.
